flags.note: Filiz Ayhan — lead stated 'İstanbul aydın üniversitesi'; written İstanbul Üniversitesi. Bare 'istanbul' token (from 'İstanbul aydın' / 'İstanbul merkeze') resolved to İÜ (A4 curated Beyazıt default) instead of İstanbul Aydın.

Merve — lead said 'Bahçeşehir Üniversitesi güney kampüs'; written Boğaziçi - Ana Kampüs. The bare 'güney kampüs' alias (migration 027) hijacks to Boğaziçi. Institution is Bahçeşehir; 'güney' has no Bahçeşehir list campus, so campus-withhold is the correct state (definitely not Boğaziçi).
Duygu Turna — lead asked for İzmir; no hizmet-veremiyoruz. Geo compute matches out-of-city university NAMES only, so a bare city name ('İzmir') yields no phrase match.
Nesrin — only the fixed-widget 'Erkek öğrenci için opsiyonlarınızı öğrenebilir miyim' text; 'erkek öğrenci' is a gender answer, not first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.
Zehra Bayraktar — widget 'kız öğrenci' + a list of universities; no parent evidence. veli unwarranted.
Murat Ertan — 'istanbul için' + 'Beyazıt Kampüsü' = İstanbul Üniversitesi (LLM got it right). Router override wrote İstanbul Aydın: bare 'istanbul' matched İ.Aydın.
Aysun — bare 'Bahçeşehir' + 'Kız' + 'Teşekkür'; no parent evidence. veli unwarranted. (University withhold on bare Bahçeşehir left unflagged — same defensible multi-campus withhold as Farhan run-2.)
Bircan Savaş — widget 'Galatasaray ünv' + 'Erkek öğrenci' gender answer; no first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.

Şevval Çetinkaya — widget stated 'Üniversitem: Marmara üniversitesi'; written Maltepe Üniversitesi. The widget property name 'Academic House Maltepe' (our own property) injected the token 'maltepe' which matched Maltepe Üniversitesi. Institution is Marmara; no campus stated → campus-withhold correct (definitely not Maltepe Üniversitesi).

merve — 'Ümraniye'de yapacağım staj için ... yurt arıyorum'; ogrenci applied off the 'kız öğrenci' gender answer. Developer's call: ogrenci-degil (the housed person's status is what matters, and lead framed this as a staj stay, not enrollment).
Sude — LLM proposed kapora-alindi from the '10000 TL kapora' sales chat; it survived to Chatwoot. kapora-alindi is a human-salesperson-only label and must never pass the Router.

Furkan Aytaş — 'mimar sinan güzel sanatlar fakültesi' (friend at Yıldız, not the lead); written Okan Üniversitesi. Regression (was correct in prior runs). LLM withheld (bilinmiyor-kampus); Router override wrote Okan.

Hazel Turan — widget 'İstanbul Teknik Üniversitesi' + 'biz itüdeyiz' (no campus); written Işık Üniversitesi - Maslak. LLM proposed İTÜ (parent → withhold); Router override wrote Işık. Institution is İTÜ, no campus stated → campus-withhold correct (definitely not Işık).

Nihan Türedi — 'Bahcesehir un8versitesi besiktas'; written bilinmiyor. LLM resolved Çırağan (Beşiktaş) correctly; the typo 'un8versitesi' (digit inside) broke the Router's phrase-gate confirmation, so it withheld.
Nergis Eraşcı — 'Sadece kız öğrenciler için mi' is a QUESTION about the dorm's gender policy, not a gender statement; gender wrongly written Kız. (İTÜ-Ayazağa university correct.)
Selda — widget + 'Ytü davutpaşa kampüsü' + 'Erkek öğrenci' gender answer; no first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.

Döner Demirci — 'Marmara Maltepe kampüsü' = Marmara's Maltepe campus (a real list value); written Maltepe Üniversitesi. The 'maltepe' token matched Maltepe Üniversitesi instead of Marmara's campus. LLM got it right.
Nuran Seyfioğlu — 'Üsküdar Ünv ... erkek öğrenci için bakıyorum' is a search phrase; no parent evidence. veli unwarranted.

'...' — 'Cerrahpaşa' correctly withheld as ambiguous (İÜC vs Cerrahpaşa Tıp); but both candidates are out-of-service, so deal_awaiting should apply. It cannot fire because deal_awaiting needs a resolved university_id — no handling for 'ambiguous but all candidates are deal_awaiting'.

Doruk Yıldırım — said 'İstanbul üniversitesi (devlet) konservatuvarı' 3+ times; written Maltepe Üniversitesi because the DISTRICT 'Maltepe' (where they want housing) matched Maltepe Üniversitesi. LLM got İÜ right.
Nihan — 'İzmir de var mı / Bornovada'; no hizmet-veremiyoruz. Bare city/district names don't match out-of-city university NAMES.
Nazan — 'İki kardesler' (her two children) = parent; ogrenci applied (lead also typed 'Ogrenci' answering a prompt). Developer's call: veli.
Ayşe — 'İstinye vadi kampüsü kağıthane' + 'Kız öğrenci' gender answer; no first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.
Eyşan Akdağ — widget 'Üniversitem: yeditepe'; written Maltepe Üniversitesi because the widget property name 'Academic House Maltepe' injected 'maltepe'. LLM got Yeditepe right.
Gülhan Can Cofcof — 'Sınava girdi cocuk / Oraları yazacak' = parent of a prospective student; ogrenci applied. Developer's call: veli.

Jule Aslan — university correctly İÜ Cerrahpaşa (out-of-service); deal_awaiting missing. İ.Ü. Cerrahpaşa is NOT in deal_awaiting_universities (Cerrahpaşa Tıp is) — a data gap, not hotel_accessible. Not serviceable, so it should fire.
Nuriye Yücedağ — İÜ Cerrahpaşa correct, out-of-service, not serviceable; deal_awaiting missing because İÜC is absent from deal_awaiting_universities (data gap).
Nuriye Yücedağ — 'Cerrahpaşa üniversitesi (erkek öğrenci)' is a search phrase, not first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.
Sami Süner — widget stated 'İÜ Cerrahpaşa'; written bilinmiyor. A later widget message with a blank 'Üniversitem:' appears to have reset the earlier İÜC signal. LLM proposed İÜC; Router withheld.
Erdem — 'Çorum'; LLM proposed hizmet-veremiyoruz but A2 stripped it and recompute found no out-of-city university NAME match for the bare province 'Çorum'. Missing.
Enda Ceren İn — 'kent üni kağıthane'; written Okan Üniversitesi. Same 'Okan magnet' false canonicalizer match as Furkan. LLM got Kent - Taksim right.
Yusuf Çalbay — 'Üsküdar üniversitesi ... Erkek' gender answer; no first-person enrollment. ogrenci unwarranted.

HasretCan Görür — repeatedly said Çukurova Üniversitesi (Adana, out-of-city); written İstanbul Üniversitesi because 'İstanbul'da kalıcam' (a location intent) matched İÜ. LLM withheld correctly; Router override wrote İÜ.
Mübeccel — İÜ Cerrahpaşa correct, out-of-service, not serviceable; deal_awaiting missing (İÜC absent from deal_awaiting_universities — data gap).
'.' — only a widget property inquiry ('Academic House Beşiktaş ... Beş Kişilik Oda'); no persona evidence. veli unwarranted.
Nehir — 'istanbul üniversitesi için konum ve fiyat' + confirmed 'kız öğrenci'; a search, no parent evidence. veli unwarranted. (İstanbul Üniversitesi correct — lead named it explicitly.)
Öykü Nil — 'medeniyet üniversitesi güney kampüs'; written Boğaziçi - Ana Kampüs via the same bare 'güney kampüs' → Boğaziçi alias (migration 027). LLM got Medeniyet right.

converter_notes: SAMPLE SCOPE: 198 conversations with >=1 successful tag_assigner_run were snapshotted. 3 leads in the DB were NOT processed and are excluded: cw 414 (Sude — run FAILED), cw 548 (Sevgi — run stuck 'processing'), cw 1477 (Saygın özcan — no run row). Note: cw 414 is the OTHER 'Sude'; the kapora-alindi 'Sude' is cw 1169 (processed).
Nancy (cw 1189) REMOVED from the graded sample per developer instruction ('English lead, don't write as success or fail'). The calculate step runs on the 197-conversation filtered sample.

English lead cw 261 ('B', 'Hello Univotel! ... Topkapı Yerleşkesi') left in the sample; its outcome (withheld + info-check) is a defensible non-error so it grades as correct-by-exception. The developer's 'B / topkapı kazlıçeşme' complaint actually maps to cw 495, which RESOLVED CORRECTLY to 'Topkapı Üniversitesi - Kazlıçeşme' — no flag (system was right).

hotel_accessible_universities EXCLUSIONS (per policy — deal_awaiting suppressed by an over-wide serviceability table, not a system error): GÖKÇE Y. (1045, İstanbul Aydın, serviceable=True via hau), Alpay Reisoğlu (1379, İstanbul Aydın, same), Kemal Alp (710, Okan Tuzla, serviceable=True via hau). Not flagged.
Musab Adabağlı (1202): developer said university 'not assigned', but it WAS captured (Medeniyet Üniversitesi - Ünalan/Göztepe) and deal_awaiting correctly applied. No flag (log overrides the guess).
Ecrin (760): 'ayazağında okuyorum' correctly resolved to İTÜ - Ayazağa and ogrenci is legitimate (first-person 'okuyorum'). No flag — this is a success.

Hamza Temiz (1376): İstanbul Bilgi with no campus stated → university withheld is defensible multi-campus behavior (Bilgi is not a curated default). Not flagged; raised as a campus-exception design question.

Bahar Ferda Topçu (940) & Aysun (1272) university: bare 'Bahçeşehir' with no campus → withhold is the current design (multi-campus, not curated). Not flagged as an attribute error (consistent with Farhan run-2). Bahçeşehir is a candidate for the campus-exception list.
Can (1269) university: bare 'İTÜ' with no campus → withhold (bilinmiyor). Same defensible multi-campus behavior as Hazel's institution; İTÜ is a candidate for the campus-exception list. Not flagged.

Ayşe Özkan Darıcı (1283): lead said Medipol 'Güney kampüs' but got Medipol - Kuzey. The list has exactly ONE Medipol campus ('Medipol Üniversitesi - Kuzey'), so Kuzey is the only Medipol value the system can write. Treated as a data-granularity gap (no Medipol Güney entry), not a matching error. Not flagged.

Merve (1446) & Şevval (1227) correct_value set to 'bilinmiyor-kampus': the institution is known (Bahçeşehir / Marmara) but the stated campus has no confirmed distinct list value, so campus-withhold is the honest gold. The graded fact is that the written value (Boğaziçi / Maltepe Üniversitesi) is wrong.
